name: Impossible 13
author: Poki
description: Impossible 13 is a casual puzzle game in which the player must combine circles with the same number until reaching number 13. Merge 3 or more circles with the same color and number to create a new one! Use your thinking skills to quickly accumulate numbers, and try to reach the Impossible 13! How to play: Merge circles - Drag left mouse button About the creator: Impossible 13 is created by RoboWhale. They are the creators behind Bouncy Woods . Give it a play on Poki!
